channel.title: NLP on Q.Docs
channel.description: Recent content in NLP on Q.Docs

item.title: Tokenizer
item.description: Tokenizers convert texts to numerical data so that models can process. 2 objectives of a good tokenizer: meaningful representation (i.e., effectiveness) smallest representation (i.

item.title: Language Models
item.description: For consistency, notations strictly follow the original papers. PLMs This section includes basic transformer-based LM structures that are still widely used when LLMs are unavailable.

item.title: RAG
item.description: References: Retrieval-Augmented Generation for Large Language Models: A Survey RAG consists of the following steps:
